title: How HubSpot Built its Content Arm Into a Media Empire That Reaches 50 Million People a Month
tldr: A breakdown of how HubSpot turned its blog and content operation into a media property reaching 50M monthly. A concrete case study in owned media and content-as-media strategy.
angle: What B2B brands can steal from HubSpot's playbook of building a media empire instead of a blog.

title: In Graphic Detail: AI visibility is no longer about referral traffic
tldr: New data shows publishers shifting strategy toward agentic traffic and brand visibility inside AI answer engines rather than chasing referral clicks. Signals a structural change in how content earns value.
why_fresh: new measurement paradigm for AI era
angle: Why content strategists must optimize for AI citations and brand presence, not just traffic.

title: Why this marketer thinks brands should stop letting dashboards make creative decisions
tldr: A marketer argues that over-reliance on analytics dashboards is hollowing out creative decision-making. A human-centric counterpoint to data-driven content culture.
angle: The case for protecting creative instinct from the tyranny of the dashboard.

title: 1 in 4 Brits believe media consumption has negative effect on wellbeing
tldr: New survey finds a quarter of Britons feel their media consumption harms wellbeing. Direct insight into shifting media-consumption attitudes and habits.
angle: How the wellbeing backlash against media reshapes content strategy and 'calm' content.

title: The top content formats & types that earn AI search citations
tldr: Analysis of which content formats get cited by AI Overviews, ChatGPT and Perplexity. Practical guidance for adapting content structure to answer engines.
angle: How to structure content so AI engines cite you, not just Google.

title: 80% of What ChatGPT Cites Doesn't Rank on Google. The Great Flattening Just Got a Price Tag.
tldr: New research shows most ChatGPT citations don't overlap with Google rankings, upending SEO assumptions. Argues AI search is a distinct discovery channel with its own economics.
angle: Why AI search citation is a separate discipline from SEO and needs its own strategy.

title: As AI automates media work, Omnicom Media is rethinking the agency business model
tldr: Omnicom is betting agency value shifts from scale to strategy, data and capability as AI automates media work. A signal of structural change in how agencies and content teams justify their existence.
angle: What the agency reinvention tells content strategists about where human value concentrates.

title: ‘It’s a CEO conversation,’ Accenture and Whalar on their playbook for the creator economy
tldr: Accenture and Whalar argue creator-economy strategy has become a boardroom-level topic for brands. Frames creators as core to corporate communications, not just marketing.
angle: Why the creator economy is now a CEO conversation and what that means for comms leaders.

title: AI FOMO is a distraction from being a good leader
tldr: Argues executives' anxiety about looking behind on AI is undermining actual leadership. A grounded take on AI hype in leadership communication.
why_fresh: contrarian leadership angle on AI hype
angle: How comms leaders can counsel executives to stop performing AI-savviness and lead instead.

title: Which brands ‘won’ the most mentions at the FIFA World Cup 2026?
tldr: A share-of-voice breakdown of which brands earned the most mentions during the World Cup. Concrete campaign measurement case study around a major event.
angle: What World Cup brand-mention data reveals about earned-media timing and moment marketing.

title: Attorneys won't admit that this is why they don't produce more thought leadership
tldr: Explores the real reasons professionals avoid producing thought leadership content. Useful for anyone coaching experts to publish.
angle: The hidden psychological blockers that stop experts from publishing thought leadership.

title: Why paywalled media coverage still matters — and how to maximize it
tldr: Argues paywalled coverage retains value in the LLM era if target audiences trust the outlet, with tips to maximize it. Useful PR-strategy reframe.
angle: How to think about earned media value when LLMs can't crawl the paywall.

title: Brand. Story. AI. The Sold-Out Event Series Bringing AI Storytelling Down to Earth
tldr: A recap of an event series focused on practical AI storytelling for brands. Points to how storytelling craft is adapting to generative tools.
angle: Keeping the human core of storytelling while integrating AI tools.

title: Kraft and Vaseline Marketers: UK Under 16s Social Ban “Great Thing”, But Onus Should Lie With Platforms
tldr: Major-brand marketers back a UK under-16 social media ban but argue platforms should bear responsibility. Signals a shift in brand stance on youth social access.
why_fresh: brand reaction to youth social ban
angle: What a youth social media ban means for brands' social strategy and audience access.
